auth.name: Izina
auth.loginFailed: Kwinjira byanze. Ongera urebe imyirondoro yawe.
auth.passwordLength: Ijambo ryibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6.

dashboard.title: Koresha imishahara, ucunge abakozi, kandi ubone ubufasha bwa AI udashyize amabanga hanze.
dashboard.description: SmartPayRW ituma kode yo muri browser iba isukuye: kwinjira, amakuru y'abakozi, amakuru y'imishahara, n'ibyifuzo bya AI byose binyura muri API zo kuri backend zagenwe na VITE_API_URL.

readiness.authDescription: Ifishi zo kwinjira no kwiyandikisha zihujwe na endpoints za backend.
readiness.routesDescription: Amapaji y'ingenzi ya fintech asaba session ya JWT ibitswe mbere yo kuyageraho.
readiness.aiDescription: Ikiganiro cya AI cyohereza ubutumwa binyuze gusa kuri endpoint ya backend.

chat.initialMessage: Muraho, ndi umufasha wa SmartPayRW. Mbaza ku gukora imishahara, amakuru y'abakozi, imisoro, cyangwa kubahiriza amategeko.
chat.eyebrow: AI ihuzwa binyuze kuri backend gusa
chat.title: Ikiganiro cya AI
chat.description: Frontend yohereza ubutumwa gusa kuri POST /api/ai/chat. Imfunguzo z'abatanga serivisi ziguma kuri backend.
chat.placeholder: Baza ku kubara imishahara, abakozi, PAYE, cyangwa kubahiriza amategeko...
chat.backendError: Ntibyakunze kugera kuri endpoint ya AI yo kuri backend.
chat.fallback: Ntibyakunze kugera kuri serivisi ya AI ya SmartPayRW. Ongera ugerageze mu kanya.
chat.emptyResponse: Serivisi ya AI yasubije, ariko nta butumwa bugarutse.

local.backendNotice: AI yo kuri backend ntiri kuboneka, bityo SmartPayRW yatanze inama z'imishahara zibarwa hano.
local.obligationsAnswer: Inshingano z'umukoresha mu Rwanda akenshi zirimo kwiyandikisha kuri PAYE, gukata PAYE y'abakozi, gukata pansiyo na maternity by'umukozi, gukusanya CBHI ku mushahara usigaye, kwishyura imisanzu y'umukoresha ya pansiyo, maternity na occupational hazard, kwita ku misanzu ya medical scheme ya RSSB aho ikurikizwa, gutanga imenyekanisha rihuriweho rya PAYE/RSSB, no kubika inyandiko z'imishahara.
local.runPayrollAnswer: Kugira ngo ukoreshe imishahara neza: banza wemeze amakuru y'abakozi n'inyungu zisoreshwa, bara umushahara mbumbe usoreshwa, bara PAYE ukoresheje ibyiciro byo mu Rwanda, kata pansiyo, maternity na CBHI by'umukozi, ongeraho inshingano za RSSB z'umukoresha, huza imibare, tanga PAYE/RSSB ku gihe, wishyure unyuze mu nzira zemewe, kandi ubike payslips n'inyemezabwishyu.
local.tinMissing: Banza wandike kandi usesengure TIN y'ikigo, hanyuma nshobore gusobanura PAYE, RSSB, CBHI n'ibyago by'imishahara bishoboka kuri icyo kigo.

tin.title: Isesengura rya TIN y'ikigo
tin.description: Sesengura TIN y'ikigo kugira ngo ubone inshingano z'imishahara, ibyago bishoboka, n'igereranya ry'ukwezi. Iyo endpoint nyayo itabonetse, SmartPayRW ikora simulation y'amakuru afatika.

obligations.paye: Kata PAYE ku mushahara w'abakozi kandi uyimenyeshe/u yishyure muri RRA bitarenze umunsi wa 15 nyuma y'igihe cy'umusoro.
obligations.pensionEmployee: Kata umusanzu wa pansiyo w'umukozi ungana na 6% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.pensionEmployer: Ishyura umusanzu wa pansiyo w'umukoresha ungana na 6% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.maternity: Koresha umusanzu wa maternity ungana na 0.3% ku mukozi na 0.3% ku mukoresha.
obligations.occupationalHazard: Ishyura umusanzu wa occupational hazard w'umukoresha ungana na 2% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.cbhi: Kata CBHI ingana na 0.5% by'umushahara usigaye w'umukozi kandi uyohereze biciye ku mukoresha.
obligations.medicalScheme: Aho medical scheme ya RSSB ikurikizwa, teganya umusanzu wa 7.5% w'umukozi na 7.5% w'umukoresha ku mushahara fatizo.
obligations.unifiedDeclaration: Koresha imenyekanisha rihuriweho rya PAYE/RSSB aho riboneka kandi ubike ibimenyetso by'imishahara.

liabilities.lateSurcharge: Igereranya ry'inyongera ku kwishyura utinze amezi {{months}}: {{amount}}.

tin.askPrompt: Sesengura TIN {{tin}} kandi usobanure inshingano z'imishahara, ibyago, n'intambwe zikurikira zo kubahiriza amategeko.
tin.invalidSummary: TIN {{tin}} ntiyashoboye kwemezwa. Ongera urebe nomero ugerageze.
